meta.title: CodyMaster — AI with Senior Engineer Discipline
meta.description: Upgrade your AI coding tools with Senior Engineer discipline. Master TDD, enforce 6 Quality Gates, preserve Working Memory, and guarantee Safe Deploys.

home.badge: Open Source · MIT License · 7 AI Platforms
home.headline:
Your AI Writes Code Fast.
It Also Ships Bugs 73% of the Time.
home.desc: CodyMaster is the skills framework that enforces TDD, 6-Gate Quality checks, Working Memory, and Safe Deploys on ANY AI coding tool. Turn fast code into production-ready code.
home.trustLabel: Seamless integration with every major AI platform
home.problemDesc: AI tools promise 10x productivity. The reality looks much different.

p1.title: Day 1: 'WOW, this is fast!'
p1.desc: AI generates 500 lines in 30 seconds. You feel invincible.

p2.title: Day 7: 'Why so many bugs?'
p2.desc: 73% of AI code ships without tests. Bugs compound. Tech debt explodes.

p3.title: Day 30: 'Let's rewrite it.'
p3.desc: No tests, no docs, lost context. Your 10x promise became a 0.5x reality.

home.rootCause: The problem isn't AI. It's AI without discipline. CodyMaster fixes that.
home.featuresDesc: CodyMaster doesn't replace your AI tool. It upgrades it with Senior Engineer habits.

tdd.title: Unbreakable TDD
tdd.desc: AI writes tests FIRST. Red → Green → Refactor. Zero exceptions. Every function ships tested.

quality.title: 6-Gate Quality System
quality.desc: Static analysis → Blind review → Security scan → Anti-sycophancy → Performance → Ship gate. Only bulletproof code passes.

memory.title: Persistent Working Memory
memory.desc: Context is preserved across sessions. Stop wasting thousands of tokens re-explaining your project every time.

deploy.title: Safe Deploy Pipeline
deploy.desc: Multi-gate deployment with auto-rollback. Staging is mandatory. Production is earned.

judge.title: Judge Agent
judge.desc: Auto-evaluates task health. Stuck > 10 min? Escalate. Failing? Pivot to a better alternative approach.

agnostic.title: Universal Agent Bootstrap
agnostic.desc: One AGENTS.md controls OpenClaw, Claude, Cursor, OpenFang, Manus, and MaxClaw. One source of truth.

before.label: Without CodyMaster
items: Deploy: copy files and hope for the best

after.label: With CodyMaster
items: AI writes tests FIRST, guarantees ≥80% coverage
Judge Agent detects loops and suggests pivots

s1.title: Describe Your Vision
s1.desc: Speak naturally. CodyMaster breaks your request into bite-sized, testable tasks.

s2.title: AI Executes with Discipline
s2.desc: TDD → Code → Test → Quality Gate → Deploy Check. The RARV cycle runs autonomously.

s3.title: Ship with Confidence
s3.desc: Review dashboard progress. Assure 6 gates passed. Deploy with rollback ready.

home.personasDesc: Whether you shape product, write code, run tests, or lead the business — CodyMaster speaks your language.

ctaSection.title: Stop Shipping Untested AI Code to Production
ctaSection.desc: Open source. MIT License. Install in 30 seconds. Elevate every AI platform you already use.

howItWorks.headline: How CodyMaster Works
howItWorks.desc: A self-correcting autonomous execution loop backed by 6-gate verification and persistent memory.
howItWorks.rarvDesc: The core of CodyMaster: preventing goal drift and guaranteeing quality at every single step.

orient.title: 0. ORIENT
orient.desc: Read CONTINUITY.md — load historical learnings and context

reason.title: 1. REASON
reason.desc: Select highest-priority task, update working memory

preact.title: 2. PRE-ACT
preact.desc: 🛡️ Goal alignment check — zero drift authorized

act.title: 3. ACT
act.desc: Execute specialized skill, secure git checkpoint

reflect.title: 4. REFLECT
reflect.desc: Update task status, capture learnings, save CONTINUITY.md

verify.title: 5. VERIFY
verify.desc: Execute 6-gate quality sweep → pass or auto-retry

howItWorks.gatesDesc: Every piece of code must pass all 6 gates before 'done' is ever spoken.

g1.label: G1
g1.title: Static Analysis
g1.desc: Lint, type check, dead code — absolutely 0 warnings allowed

g3.label: G3
g3.title: Blind Review
g3.desc: AI rigorously reviews code without context to verify purely logical quality

g4.label: G4
g4.title: Anti-Sycophancy
g4.desc: Devil's Advocate pass specifically hunting for hidden flaws

g5.label: G5
g5.title: Security Scan
g5.desc: Complete secrets check and OWASP vulnerability compliance

g6.label: G6
g6.title: i18n Integrity
g6.desc: All localization keys perfectly synced across languages

howItWorks.memoryDesc: AI never forgets. Context survives across sessions — documenting actions, failures, and architectural decisions.

memorySteps.start: Session Start → Read CONTINUITY.md and revive past learnings
memorySteps.work: During Work → Update task queue, track real-time items
memorySteps.error: On Error → Capture EXACT failure point and prevention tactic
memorySteps.end: Session End → Imprint state for the next session

howItWorks.judgeDesc: Automatic task health evaluation that intervenes when AI goes wrong.

rules.r1: 🔒 Identity First — confirm account before ANY push/deploy
rules.r2: 📐 Design Before Code — planning governs execution
rules.r3: 🧪 Test Before Code — RED → GREEN → REFACTOR is law
rules.r4: 🛡️ PRE-ACT — align with goals on every action
rules.r5: 📊 Evidence Over Claims — trust only terminal output
rules.r6: 🚀 Deploy via Gates — no deploy fails the 6 gates
rules.r7: 🧠 Memory First — CONTINUITY.md leads every session
rules.r8: 📚 Capture Learnings — failures synthesize into wisdom

showcase.headline: CodyMaster in Action
showcase.desc: Step-by-step unvarnished reality: what it looks like from the first prompt to a production deploy.

ex1.title: Build a Dashboard Feature
ex1.desc: Revenue analytics with charts and exports — autonomously built in one session.

steps.s3: Execute: `@[/cm-execution]` runs TDD → Code → Test → Quality
steps.s4: Monitor: View real-time progress on localhost:6969 dashboard

ex2.title: Diagnose & Fix a Bug
ex2.desc: Unresponsive iOS button — triaged, patched, and safely shipped in 20 minutes.

steps.s2: Fix via TDD: establish failing test → write patch → refactor
steps.s3: Memory Update: CONTINUITY.md learns the patch to prevent recurrence
steps.s4: Deploy hotfix with confident auto-rollback safeguards active

ex3.title: Shattering Session Amnesia
ex3.desc: AI flawlessly resumes complex work — even 14 hours later.

steps.s1: Session 1: Agent plans architecture and logs to CONTINUITY.md
steps.s2: Session 2: Agent revives context instantly for 200 tokens (not 2000)
steps.s3: Session 3: 14 hours later, previous 8 completed tasks are seamlessly recalled

ex4.title: Deploying the 6-Gate System
ex4.desc: Blind review spots 2 critical blind spots — automatically remediated.

steps.s1: Gates 1 & 2: Static analysis & test coverage PASS flawlessy
steps.s2: Gate 3: Blind review detects unparameterized SQL query
steps.s3: Auto-Correction: Refactor executes, re-runs Gate 3 → PASS
steps.s4: Gates 4 through 6: Anti-sycophancy, security, i18n ALL CLEAR
steps.s5: 🚀 AUTHORIZED: Code safely greenlit for deployment

You Describe It.

pm.rootCause: The root cause isn't your devs or AI. It's that current AI tools have zero discipline.

s1.title: Dictate Vision
s1.desc: Detail your idea in plain words. CodyMaster structures the pipeline.

s2.title: Regimented Execution

s3.title: Final Review

u5.before: Deploy: Pray to the server gods

f1.q: I'm not a dev. Can I actually use this?
f1.a: Yes! You handle the 'what', CodyMaster handles the 'how' — writing tests, code, and enforcing quality. You just approve the result.

f2.a: Absolutely. Code must pass Static Analysis, Blind Review, Security Scans, and rigorous automated tests before it ever considers 'deploy'.

f3.q: Why not just use Copilot or Cursor directly?
f3.a: Those tools generate code. CodyMaster applies Senior Engineer boundaries ON TOP of them to ensure the code they generate isn't garbage.

f4.a: Zero dollars. CodyMaster is fully open-source (MIT License). You only pay your underlying AI provider (like Anthropic or OpenAI).

f5.a: Under 5 minutes via npm. Immediate dashboard access. Agnostic across 7 top platforms.

dev.headline:
Unchecked AI is a Liability.
Disciplined AI is an Asset.
dev.desc: CodyMaster is essentially .eslintrc for AI logic. Mandate TDD before writing code, pass 6 gates before merging, and leverage memory that never drops context.

p1.title: The 'WOW' to 'WHY' Pipeline
p1.desc: Day 1 is magical speed. Day 30 is tightly-coupled tech debt requiring a rewrite.

p2.title: 73% Without Tests
p2.desc: Current tools optimize for typing speed, not logic. Fast and wrong is slower than doing it right.

p3.title: Total Context Amnesia
p3.desc: Sinking 1000 tokens just to re-explain your data models every morning.

tdd.title: 🔴 Strict TDD Lock
tdd.desc: AI cannot code without testing first. Red → Green → Refactor. No negotiations.

gates.title: 🛡️ 6-Gate Funnel
gates.desc: Lint → Blind Review → Secret Scan → Anti-Sycophancy → UX/Perf → Ship. A true gauntlet.

memory.title: 🧠 Continuity Protocol
memory.desc: It saves granular decisions locally. Next week, 'Continue' drops it right back in the zone.

judge.title: 🤖 Judge Escrow
judge.desc: 🟢 CONTINUE | 🏁 COMPLETE | ⚠️ ESCALATE | 🔄 PIVOT. Prevents infinite looping.

u3.problem: AI stuck in a hallucination loop

f1.q: Is this a slow wrapper API?
f1.a: No, overhead is zero. Skills are native markdown instructions for your agent, not proxy servers.

f2.a: All of them. CodyMaster dictates *how* the AI operates (testing, verifying) rather than syntax.

f3.a: Not at all. It runs alongside them as an operational scaffold, injecting much-needed rigor.

f4.a: 100% locally resident in `.cm/CONTINUITY.md`. No external servers. Ignorable via .gitignore.

f5.a: Extremely simple. Write a Markdown file in your `skills/` folder and the AI inherently understands it.

qa.headline:
AI Churns Out 10x the Code.
Don't Inherit 10x the Bugs.
qa.desc: Right now, you're the only defense against AI slop. Choose CodyMaster: mandatory TDD and 6 automated quality gates catch the low-level garbage *before* it hits your desk.

p1.title: Floodgate Open
p1.desc: Devs use AI to ship 500 lines/day. But QA headcount is the same. Burnout ensures.

p2.title: Unpredictable Code
p2.desc: AI is a code factory lacking a QA stamp. It's fast, chaotic, and bug-dense.

p3.title: The True Job of QA
p3.desc: You aren't here to find missing commas. You are the architect of business logic integrity.

gates.g1: GATE 1: Static Check — Linters, typings, missing variables entirely eliminated.
gates.g2: GATE 2: TDD Wall — Zero tests = zero pass. Coverage metrics rigorously met.
gates.g3: GATE 3: Blind Review — A secondary AI scrutinizes code for silent architectural flaws.
gates.g4: GATE 4: Sec-Scan — Absolute zero hardcoded secrets or OWASP basic violations.
gates.g5: GATE 5: Performance — Bundle bloating and complexity thresholds strictly policed.
gates.g6: GATE 6: Ship Gate — The final boss. Controlled exclusively by your approval.

qa.gatesSummary: Code undergoes intense mechanical scrutiny before you even glance at it.
qa.reframeTitle: From Bug Hunter to Quality Architect
qa.reframeBefore: Before: Mindlessly verifying if a button click crashes the app for the 47th time. 😔
qa.reframeAfter: After: Reviewing a pristine dashboard, focusing on systemic edge cases, and guiding product standards. 💪
qa.reframeConclusion: AI doesn't erase QA. AI elevates QA to Engineering status.

f1.a: It replaces manual drudgery. You graduate to managing systemic quality, UX, and advanced architectural validation.

f2.a: Agnostic. Playwright, Cypress, Jest, Pytest. `cm-test-gate` structures it.

f3.q: Can I enforce my own rules?
f3.a: Yes. Outline your QA mandates in the core instruction set, and the AI is bound to execute them flawlessly.

f4.a: Absolutely not. CodyMaster's structure enforces the gates on the agent level. Gate 6 locks the door without you.

A Team of 3 Outpaces a Team of 10.
The Catalyst is Discipline.
founder.desc: You bought the hype of '10x AI productivity' and got 10x the tech debt. CodyMaster injects Senior Engineer rigor into your pipeline. Better code. Faster delivery. Realized ROI.

p3.reality: Endless regressions blocking the next sprint

founder.roiSummary: Your team amplified by CodyMaster reaches 90% peak productive capacity, yielding an undeniable 9x return on every engineering dollar.

d1.value: Continuous real-time visibility — end the intrusive status updates.

d2.value: Pinpoints stuck execution in real-time before deadlines slip.

d3.value: Quantifiable QA gating and pass-rates ready for the board deck.

d4.value: Track staging to production pushes with 1-click auto-rollback assurance.

f1.a: Week 1: Quality gates stabilize code. Month 1: Velocity effectively doubles. Quarter 1: Cost to ship a feature plummets by 60%.

f2.a: Engineers violently defend CodyMaster. It obliterates tedious code review disputes and repetitive manual testing.

f3.a: No. MIT Licensed. Completely free. Your only cost is your Anthropic/OpenAI API keys.

f4.q: Does your platform scrape my codebase?
f4.a: Absolutely not. Zero data leaves your VPC. CodyMaster acts as a local operational logic layer on the developers' hardware.

f5.q: Why use this instead of hiring a Senior Dev?
f5.a: A senior engineer is $120k+ a year. CodyMaster scales Senior DNA to every junior dev on your team for $0.
